transcript: Speaker A: काय करताय? [What are you doing?] Speaker B: आय, दुधात पाणी mixing. [I, mixing water in milk.] Speaker A: दुधात पाणी mixing नाही. "I am mixing water in the milk" असं म्हणायचं. [Not "mixing water in milk". Say "I am mixing water in the milk".] Speaker B: अरे वा! मला पण English शिकायचंय. [Oh wow! I also want to learn English.] Speaker A: नक्की! रोज माझ्यासोबत फक्त १५ मिनिटं प्रॅक्टिस केली, तर तुम्ही पटकन English बोलायला शिकू शकता. [Sure! If you practice with me for just 15 minutes daily, you can quickly learn to speak English.] Speaker B: पण माझ्याकडे फीस भरण्यासाठी पैसे नाहीत. [But I don't have money to pay the fees.] Speaker A: काळजी करू नका. तुम्ही फक्त १ रुपयाच्या trial पासून सुरुवात करू शकता. [Don't worry. You can start with just a 1 rupee trial.] Speaker B: जॉईन कसं व्हायचं? [How to join?] Speaker A: खाली दिलेल्या install बटनवर क्लिक करा. MySivi app install करा आणि तुमची English प्रॅक्टिस सुरू करा. [Click on the install button below. Install the MySivi app and start your English practice.]
on_screen_text: काय करताय [What are you doing] दुधात पाणी mixing [mixing water in milk] hahaha दुधात पाणी mixing नाही [Not mixing water in milk] I am mixing water in the milk असं म्हणायचं [Say like this] अरे वा मला पण English [Oh wow, I also English] शिकायचंय नक्की [want to learn, sure] रोज माझ्यासोबत [daily with me] 15 MINUTES फीस भरण्यासाठी [to pay fees] पैसे नाहीत काळजी [no money, worry] करू नका तुम्ही [don't do, you] MySivi Premium LIMITED TIME OFFER 3 days of Premium benefits for ₹1 फक्त 1 रुपयाच्या [just for 1 rupee] trial पासून सुरुवात [start from trial] करू शकता Join [can do, Join] 1,200 learners purchased today 24/7 AI English Teacher 500+ Exercises and Lessons Unlimited Access कसं व्हायचं खाली [how to become, below] दिलेल्या install [given install] button वर click [click on button] करा MySivi app [do, MySivi app] install करा आणि [install and] तुमची English [your English] practice सुरू [practice start] करा [do]
summary: An AI avatar corrects a Marathi-speaking milkman's broken English, demonstrating how the MySivi app helps users learn correct English. The ad highlights a 3-day premium trial for just ₹1 to address affordability concerns. It concludes with a call to action to install the MySivi app and start practicing.
